note: Current/active compressed on-disk size per system. Excludes Snowflake time-travel (1.06 TiB) + fail-safe (787 GiB) and Databricks time-travel — i.e. the active footprint only, the apples-to-apples comparison. Snowflake MV bytes cover 14.88M physical fragments over 1.72M logical (sym,day) groups.
